channel.title: KKT — Insights
channel.description: Working in Public — notes from inside KKT engagements. Two named authors, one post a month.

item.title: How to read a diagnostic readout.
item.description: What we put in a two-week diagnostic deliverable, what we deliberately leave out, and what to argue with on the readout call.
item.author: KKT

item.title: What this column will be.
item.description: Working in Public is the editorial program at KKT. Two named authors, one post a month, no marketing fluff. Here's what to expect — and what we will not publish.
item.author: KKT
